prompt: There's a bug in our duration parser — ParseDuration('1.5h') returns 0 instead of 1h30m. The file is at duration.go. Fix it using TDD. The bug is that we use strconv.Atoi which silently fails on fractional values. Switch to strconv.ParseFloat.
assertions: A regression test for the specific bug is written BEFORE any fix is applied
The regression test name clearly describes the bug (e.g., TestParseDuration_HandlesFractionalHours)
The regression test is run and confirmed to FAIL before the fix
The fix uses strconv.ParseFloat instead of strconv.Atoi (as the bug description suggests)
The fix is minimal — only changes what's needed to handle fractional values
Existing behaviors are preserved (integer durations like '2h' still work)
Additional edge cases are tested (e.g., '0.5m', '2.25h', fractional seconds)
All tests pass after the fix
